evidence_excerpt: Symptoms partially resolved over the subsequent 18 months, but follow-up skin biopsies continued to show marked persistent epidermal denervation.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: Partial resolution was noted over 18 months, yet biopsies showed persistent epidermal denervation, indicating ongoing residual symptoms rather than complete resolution.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: Symptoms partially resolved over the subsequent 18 months.

notes_on_uncertainty: Data derived from Case 4 of a cohort report rather than a dedicated longitudinal single-patient record. The index time is approximated as the initial specialist evaluation. Long-term functional status and symptom severity are inferred from reported partial symptom resolution and persistent denervation; explicit activity-based outcomes were not detailed.
